title: chrysophyllum delpydora
intro: Chrysophyllum delpydora, also known as the white star apple, is a tropical tree native to West Africa. Its bark, leaves, and fruit are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysophyllum delpydora include treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions of the bark and leaves, and decoctions of the fruit, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other remedies.
